error_signature: argument must be a string (was: object)
title: LDAP node argument type error
symptom: When trying to add Active Directory groups to a user with the LDAP node, an error occurs stating 'argument must be a string (was: object)'.
applies_when: Attempting to add groups to a user
not_this_if: Error occurs when not using the LDAP node
root_cause: The LDAP node expects a string input for certain parameters, but it is receiving an object instead. This typically happens when trying to pass an array or object directly without converting it to a string format.
fix_steps: Use a code node to loop through the array of groups
Convert each group to a string before passing it to the LDAP node
agent_instruction: Implement a code node to loop through the groups and ensure each is passed as a string to the LDAP node.
